meta.title: Seattle Weather Pivot
meta.description: A DuckDB `PIVOT` query reshapes Seattle's daily weather observations into a cross-tab: one row per year, with a column counting the days of each weather type. The pivoted result is shown in a sortable `table` view. Click a column header to sort.

weatherByYear.query: PIVOT (SELECT *, year(date) AS year FROM seattle_weather) ON weather IN ('drizzle', 'fog', 'rain', 'snow', 'sun') USING count(*) GROUP BY year ORDER BY year
